name: authchanger
description: Authchanger is a utility included with Jamf Connect to help you manage the authorization database used by macOS to determine how the login process progresses

options.description: Prints the current list of authorization mechanisms
Does a dry run of the changes and prints out what would have happened
Resets the login screen to the factory settings
Sets up Jamf Connect Login to only demobilze accounts
Adds the DEP Notify addition to the corresponding -AD, or -Setup argument
Adds the DEP Notify addition to the corresponding -AD, or -Setup argument
Mechs to be used before the actual UI is shown
Mechs to be used between the login UI and actual authentication
Mechs to be used after system authentication
Allows the printout of any authorizationDB rule as well as setting of that rule to any custom mechanism(s)
Enables Azure authentication for the Network Preference Pane
Removes Azure authentication for the Network Preference Pane
Adds the mechanism to be used with the sudosaml binary
